title: calophyllum cuneifolium
intro: Calophyllum cuneifolium, also known as the Malaysian canarium or pokok buah keras in Malay, is a plant species belonging to the family Calophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum cuneifolium include its potential to treat various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Calophyllum cuneifolium is often used to make ointments, creams, and extracts, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
